creator: dom@myrddin.demon.co.uk
text:
I'm listed as the maintainer of textproc/prag port.  I notice
	that the ports collection appears to have acquired a fully
	fledged grap(1) of it's own, which should probably be used in
	preference to this work-a-like written in awk.

	Therefore, I request that somebody delete this port.

Fix: 

n/a
How-To-Repeat: 
	n/a
